params.name: 12 Zodiac Runes
params.description:
On Sept 3, 473 AD, the twelve magical runes were forged.
The Twelve Zodiac Runes are ancient relics imbued with powerful energy. Each individual rune can bestow the corresponding power onto its holder. When they encounter other runes, their energy resonates and their effects are amplified. Their immense power has caused them to be sought after and fought over by both good and evil forces.
